message.content: Search GitHub for "notebooklm cli" or "notebooklm-cli" or "notebook-lm cli". Find repos related to Google NotebookLM CLI tool. Use gh search repos and web search. Report back the repo names, descriptions, stars, and URLs.

content.text: GitHub과 웹에서 NotebookLM CLI 관련 레포를 검색하겠습니다.
GitHub CLI와 웹 검색을 병렬로 실행하겠습니다.

input.command: gh search repos "notebooklm cli" --limit 10 --json name,owner,description,stargazersCount,url 2>/dev/null || echo "gh search failed"
gh search repos "notebooklm-cli" --limit 10 --json name,owner,description,stargazersCount,url 2>/dev/null || echo "gh search failed"
gh search repos "notebook-lm" --limit 10 --sort stars --json name,owner,description,stargazersCount,url 2>/dev/null || echo "gh search failed"

Query your uploaded documents and get source-grounded, citation-backed answers from Gemini. Features browser automation, library management, persistent authentication, and answers exclusively from your own knowledge base. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-skill"},{"title":"GitHub - PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp: MCP server for NotebookLM - Let your AI agents (Claude Code, Codex) research documentation directly with grounded, citation-backed answers from Gemini. Persistent auth, library management, cross-client sharing. Zero hallucinations, just your knowledge base. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp"},{"title":"GitHub - teng-lin/notebooklm-py: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.","url":"https://github.com/teng-lin/notebooklm-py"},{"title":"GitHub - lfnovo/open-notebook: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook"}]

Based on the search results, here are the key NotebookLM CLI tools available on GitHub in 2025-2026:

## Major NotebookLM CLI Projects

### 1. **notebooklm-mcp-cli** (Most Recent Update)
This project received a major update in January 2026, completely refactoring to unify NotebookLM-MCP and NotebookLM-CLI into a single package that includes both the CLI (nlm) and MCP server (notebooklm-mcp). It allows connecting AI assistants like Claude, Gemini, Cursor, and others to NotebookLM with automatic setup configuration.

### 2. **notebooklm-py**
This project, released in January 2025, reverse-engineers NotebookLM's undocumented APIs, giving users programmatic access to every feature the platform offers. It provides full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

### 3. **nlm (Go-based CLI)**
This is a powerful command-line interface for Google's NotebookLM, allowing you to manage notebooks, sources, notes, audio/video overviews, and AI-powered content transformation from your terminal.

### 4. **nblm-rs**
In September 2025, Google released the NotebookLM Enterprise API, enabling programmatic access to NotebookLM features for the first time. nblm-rs is an unofficial NotebookLM Enterprise API client built on a Rust core, with interfaces for both the CLI and a Python SDK.

### 5. **notebooklm-skill & notebooklm-mcp** (PleasePrompto)
These tools provide integration with Claude Code and other AI agents, offering browser automation for direct interaction with NotebookLM notebooks.

All of these tools use undocumented or internal Google APIs and come with disclaimers about potential API changes and terms of service considerations.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Built with FastAPI & Playwright.","url":"https://github.com/israelbls/notebooklm-podcast-automator"},{"title":"notebooklm · GitHub Topics · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/topics/notebooklm"},{"title":"NotebookLM-py: The CLI Tool That Unlocks Google NotebookLM | by Ewan Mak | Jan, 2026 | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/@tentenco/notebooklm-py-the-cli-tool-that-unlocks-google-notebooklm-1de7106fd7ca"},{"title":"GitHub - khengyun/notebooklm-mcp: Professional Automation for Google NotebookLM · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/khengyun/notebooklm-mcp"}]

I found several GitHub repositories for Google NotebookLM API CLI automation tools. Here are the key ones:

## Popular NotebookLM API/CLI Projects:

1. **notebooklm-py - Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM with full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features via Python, CLI, and AI agents**
   - Repository: https://github.com/teng-lin/notebooklm-py
   - Supports bulk-import of sources (URLs, PDFs, YouTube, Google Drive) and research automation

2. **NotebookLM-API - Automate Google NotebookLM with a FastAPI service and Playwright to upload sources and generate Audio Overviews programmatically**
   - Repository: https://github.com/osen77/NotebookLM-API
   - Includes Docker support

3. **nlm - A command-line interface for Google's NotebookLM, allowing you to manage notebooks, sources, notes, audio/video overviews, and AI-powered content transformation from your terminal**
   - Repository: https://github.com/tmc/nlm
   - Built with Go

4. **notebooklm-mcp-cli - Connects AI assistants (Claude, Gemini, Cursor, etc.) to NotebookLM with automatic setup for each tool**
   - Repository: https://github.com/jacob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cli

5. **notebooklm-skill - Claude Code skill that enables communication with your Google NotebookLM notebooks, with browser automation, library management, and persistent authentication**
   - Repository: https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-skill

6. **nblm-rs - An unofficial NotebookLM Enterprise API client built on a Rust core, with interfaces for both CLI and Python SDK**
   - Repository: https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs

These tools enable automation and programmatic access to NotebookLM features that aren't available through the standard web UI.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.text:
검색 결과를 정리합니다.

---

## Google NotebookLM CLI 관련 GitHub 레포 검색 결과

### 주요 레포 (Stars 순)

| # | 레포명 | Stars | 설명 | URL |
|---|--------|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **notebooklm-py** | 4,985 | Python API + CLI + AI 에이전트 스킬. NotebookLM의 비공개 API를 역공학하여 웹 UI에 없는 기능까지 프로그래밍 접근 가능 | https://github.com/teng-lin/notebooklm-py |
| 2 | **notebooklm-mcp-cli** | 2,363 | CLI(`nlm`) + MCP 서버를 통합한 패키지. Claude, Gemini, Cursor 등 AI 어시스턴트를 NotebookLM에 연결 | https://github.com/jacob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cli |
| 3 | **notebooklm-cli** | 142 | notebooklm-mcp-cli의 이전 버전 (CLI 단독). 같은 저자(jacob-bd) | https://github.com/jacob-bd/notebooklm-cli |
| 4 | **nblm-rs** | 78 | Rust 코어 기반 비공식 NotebookLM Enterprise API 클라이언트. CLI + Python SDK 제공 | https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs |

### 기타 관련 레포

| # | 레포명 | Stars | 설명 | URL |
|---|--------|-------|------|-----|
| 5 | **nlm** (tmc) | - | Go 언어 기반 NotebookLM CLI. 노트북/소스/노트/오디오 관리 및 AI 콘텐츠 변환 | https://github.com/tmc/nlm |
| 6 | **notebooklm-skill** | - | Claude Code 전용 스킬. 브라우저 자동화로 NotebookLM과 직접 통신 | https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-skill |
| 7 | **notebooklm-mcp** (PleasePrompto) | - | NotebookLM MCP 서버. Claude Code, Codex 등 에이전트용 | https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp |
| 8 | **NotebookLM-API** (osen77) | - | FastAPI + Playwright 기반 자동화. Docker 지원 | https://github.com/osen77/NotebookLM-API |
| 9 | **notebooklm-podcast-automator** | - | REST API로 소스 업로드 및 AI 팟캐스트 오디오 자동 생성 | https://github.com/israelbls/notebooklm-podcast-automator |

### 참고: NotebookLM 오픈소스 대안

| 레포명 | Stars | 설명 | URL |
|--------|-------|------|-----|
| **open-notebook** | 20,836 | NotebookLM의 오픈소스 구현체. 더 유연한 기능 제공 | https://github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook |

### 요약

- **가장 인기 있는 CLI 도구**: `notebooklm-py` (4,985 stars) -- Python 기반, CLI + API + 에이전트 스킬 통합
- **MCP 통합 최강**: `notebooklm-mcp-cli` (2,363 stars) -- CLI와 MCP 서버를 하나로 통합, `pip install notebooklm-mcp-cli`로 설치
- **Rust 기반**: `nblm-rs` -- 2025년 9월 Google의 NotebookLM Enterprise API 공개 이후 공식 API 기반으로 구축
- 대부분의 도구는 비공식/역공학 API를 사용하므로 Google 정책 변경 시 동작이 중단될 수 있음

Sources:
- [notebooklm-py](https://github.com/teng-lin/notebooklm-py)
- [notebooklm-mcp-cli](https://github.com/jacob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cli)
- [notebooklm-cli](https://github.com/jacob-bd/notebooklm-cli)
- [nblm-rs](https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs)
- [nlm (Go CLI)](https://github.com/tmc/nlm)
- [notebooklm-skill](https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-skill)
- [NotebookLM-py Medium 소개글](https://medium.com/@tentenco/notebooklm-py-the-cli-tool-that-unlocks-google-notebooklm-1de7106fd7ca)
- [GitHub notebooklm 토픽](https://github.com/topics/notebooklm)
